sentences.arabic: طَبَعَتْ مُنَى وَثَائِقَ مُهِمَّةً قَبْلَ الِاجْتِمَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Muna je odštampala važne dokumente prije sastanka.
sentences.translationEn: Muna printed important documents before the meeting.

sentences.translation: Složila ih je i stavila po jedan primjerak za svakog sudionika.
sentences.translationEn: She arranged them and placed a copy for each participant.

sentences.arabic: حَضَرَ الِاجْتِمَاعُ فِي الْوَقْتِ وَكَانَ مُنَظَّمًا.
sentences.translation: Sastanak je počeo na vrijeme i bio je organizovan.
sentences.translationEn: The meeting started on time and was well organised.

sentences.translation: Direktor joj je zahvalio na dobrim pripremama.
sentences.translationEn: The manager thanked her for the good preparation.
